name: Chevron Corporation
description: Chevron Corporation is one of the world's leading integrated energy companies, involved in virtually every facet of the energy industry. The company explores for, produces, and transports crude oil and natural gas; refines, markets, and distributes transportation fuels and lubricants; manufactures and sells petrochemicals and additives; and develops and deploys technologies that enhance business value in every aspect of the company's operations. Headquartered in San Ramon, California, Chevron operates globally, maintaining a significant presence in major oil and gas basins while investing in lower-carbon business lines to support a lower-carbon future.
